thread_model: synchronous repo mutex / recursive filesystem IO; no async spawn, no callback thread, no process handoff
callees: skill-backups/id path and metadata/delete semantics cross-closed with Windows direct helper 0x14024CDD0; mac string cluster and serializer fields confirm delete_skill_backup envelope
side_effect: mutating FS: join skill-backups/id, metadata/not-found check, remove backup dir/file, reload backup count
error_surface: Tauri/CoreEnvelope ok/error. Error branches include missing repo/state, poisoned lock, invalid/missing SKILL.md, not-found id, metadata read/parse failure, create/copy/remove IO failure, canonicalize failure where applicable.
acceptance_mapping: manual/unit: delete existing backup decrements count; missing id returns not-found/error; remove failure surfaces error
